flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Valley College-Martinsburg fell 50% between 2022 and 2024 (100.0% → 50.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Valley College-Martinsburg rose 31% between 2009 and 2012 ($8.6k → $11.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Valley College-Martinsburg rose 31% between 2009 and 2012 ($8.6k → $11.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 10 pp at Valley College-Martinsburg vs the 2018–2022 baseline (58.3% vs 68.5%).
